overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from narrow alleys with purple neon lights across open intersections beneath massive elevated highways, then through dark service alleys and into a covered walkway with blue neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with digital billboards

events.description: exits narrow neon-lit alley into open urban street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alley lined with glowing purple neon and digital billboards, emerging into a wider street

entered.detail: glowing purple neon trim around a doorway entrance
large illuminated advertisement displaying 'NEW HERO' text with product image
suspended billboard with bright animated character graphics
green-tinted futuristic vehicle parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow alleyway illuminated by vibrant purple neon lights and digital billboards. The camera moves forward, transitioning from the enclosed space into a wider urban street with visible traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection beneath elevated highways

events.description: camera tilts upward to view massive overhead highway structure and architecture
crossing the wide street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the massive elevated highway structures overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: massive multi-level concrete highway structure with glowing strip lights underneath
large suspended billboard with colorful animated graphics
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast intersection dominated by massive elevated highway structures. The camera crosses the street while tilting up to admire the architecture, with futuristic vehicles passing by and neon billboards visible against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: continuing forward alongside moving traffic under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk parallel to traffic, following a pedestrian in a distinctive red coat

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: glowing teal neon sign reading 'softsys' on building facade
teal-colored escalator structure leading to upper pedestrian walkway
line of parked futuristic vehicles along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive overpass structure, the camera follows a pedestrian in a red coat along a sidewalk lined with parked cars. Neon signs and an escalator structure become visible ahead as traffic moves along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service alley with graffiti and vending machines

events.description: enters darker alleyway beneath the escalator structure with graffiti walls
passing illuminated vending machines with bright pink neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit alleyway, passing piles of trash and graffiti-covered walls beneath the infrastructure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near vending machine looking at phone

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
bags and cardboard debris stacked against the wall
illuminated vending machine with bright pink and purple neon lighting
vertical digital advertisement with 'FEEL THE HEAT' text and purple neon border

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a darker, narrower alley beneath the infrastructure. The camera passes graffiti-covered walls, piles of trash, and glowing vending machines while approaching a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with linear neon lighting

events.description: enters corridor with uniform blue neon ceiling lights creating linear perspective

agents.ego_description: walking through a long covered corridor illuminated by blue neon strips, approaching a lit storefront ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing and smoking near the wall

entered.detail: long linear blue fluorescent lights running the length of the ceiling
raised concrete planters with bushes and green plants
brightly lit shop entrance at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a long covered walkway illuminated by striking blue neon ceiling lights. The corridor features planters with greenery and leads toward a brightly lit storefront in the distance, with sparse pedestrians visible along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit alleyway through a massive urban intersection and into a sterile, blue-lit corridor. It begins in a narrow passage illuminated by purple neon and digital billboards, moving forward as the enclosed space opens into a wide street filled with traffic and pedestrians. As the camera crosses a vast intersection, it tilts upward toward towering elevated highway structures and glowing billboards against the dark sky before following a pedestrian in a red coat along a sidewalk of parked cars. The scene then shifts into a darker, grittier alley beneath the overpass, passing graffiti-covered walls and glowing vending machines. Finally, the camera enters a long covered walkway where the lighting transforms into striking blue neon, gliding past greenery toward a brightly lit storefront in the distance.
